title: [Goal] Canvas iterations
description:
## Description

Fix and improve canvas UX interactions

## Tasks

- [x] **#g020#t01**: Migrate internal Create UI to menu button
  The internal Create UI should be migrated to a CoreUIBar menu button
- [x] **#g020#t02**: Remove Remove actions from canvas objects
  Remove the Remove action buttons from canvas objects
- [x] **#g020#t03**: Make canvas objects selectable with delete support
  Every canvas object should be selectable (click gives accent 2px border). Pressing Delete with an object selected should remove it (local environment only)
- [x] **#g020#t04**: Watch for pasted URLs and convert to Rich Content Preview
  Canvas should watch for paste events. Pasted URLs should be converted into a Rich Content Preview component
- [x] **#g020#t05**: Convert pasted text to markdown block
  Pasted plain text should be converted into a markdown block on the canvas

---
_Managed by clips • Goal ID: #g020_
